channel.title: Ault Blockchain — Newsroom
channel.description: Press releases, announcements, and third-party coverage from Ault Blockchain.

item.title: Ault Blockchain launches mainnet — Hybrid PoW/PoS sovereign chain, Licensed Mining Nodes live
item.description: Ault Blockchain mainnet is live. Hybrid PoW/PoS consensus with a Licensed Mining Node layer for off-chain verifiable work is now operational.

item.title: Smart-contract audit complete — report pending public release
item.description: Independent smart-contract audit has been completed. The full report is pending legal review before public release.

item.title: Argentum (Ag) RWA tokenization program soft-launched on Ault Blockchain
item.description: The Argentum RWA tokenization program has soft-launched on Ault Blockchain, marking the first structured product deployment on the network.

item.title: OnlyBulls exceeds 50,000 downloads across iOS, Android, and web
item.description: OnlyBulls, the AULT wallet and AI market intelligence companion app, has exceeded 50,000 cumulative downloads across all platforms.

item.title: Mainnet live — Hybrid PoW/PoS sovereign chain operational, Licensed Mining Node layer active
item.description: Ault Blockchain mainnet has been live since 3 March 2026. The Licensed Mining Node layer is active and accepting new licensee registrations.
